modules.label: Backup
modules.description: Draft-first backup flows, run tracking, and storage targets.

dependencies.message: Backup edit and full access require Apps view or higher because Backup reuses saved sources and destinations from Apps.

modules.label: Apps
modules.description: Role-neutral registry of reusable app and destination credentials.

modules.label: Pipeline
modules.description: Source-to-destination sync pipelines built on top of reusable app credentials.

dependencies.message: Pipeline edit and full access require Apps view or higher because Pipeline reuses saved source and destination credentials from Apps.

modules.label: Automation
modules.description: Reusable workflow automation and future orchestration surfaces.

dependencies.message: Automation edit and full access require Apps view or higher because Automation reuses saved app credentials from Apps.

modules.label: Settings
modules.description: Workspace users, presets, and permission management.
